message:
feat(claim): atomic claim guard with IMMEDIATE transaction (beads_rust-3e5j)

Move the claim assignee check from outside the transaction (TOCTOU race)
to inside the SQLite IMMEDIATE transaction in update_issue(). Two concurrent
agents can no longer both see "unassigned" and both succeed.

New IssueUpdate fields:
- expect_unassigned: triggers the in-transaction guard
- claim_exclusive: rejects re-claims even by same actor
- claim_actor: for idempotent same-actor detection

Config: claim.exclusive (default false) controls exclusive mode.
Whitespace-only assignees treated as unassigned.

9 new tests including concurrent race condition verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
